## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly Director Standup to discuss ongoing projects, client updates, and new initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/vXzBXJMiBqyEsGUAwdYTjBonc32iv7_K?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New LLMs.txt file standard discussed; team to create workflow for implementation](https://fathom.video/share/vXzBXJMiBqyEsGUAwdYTjBonc32iv7_K?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Webflow account issues resolved; pod aliases added to client accounts](https://fathom.video/share/vXzBXJMiBqyEsGUAwdYTjBonc32iv7_K?tab=summary&timestamp=1866.0)
  - [Debate on value and measurement of new SEO/LLM initiatives like Scrunch and LLMs.txt](https://fathom.video/share/vXzBXJMiBqyEsGUAwdYTjBonc32iv7_K?tab=summary&timestamp=1131.0)
  - [AirByte's Reddit posting strategy shared as potential tactic for other clients](https://fathom.video/share/vXzBXJMiBqyEsGUAwdYTjBonc32iv7_K?tab=summary&timestamp=1524.0)

## Topics

### LLMs.txt Implementation

  - [New proposed standard for helping LLMs understand website context](https://fathom.video/share/vXzBXJMiBqyEsGUAwdYTjBonc32iv7_K?tab=summary&timestamp=363.0)
  - [Dave developing workflow to generate LLMs.txt files for clients](https://fathom.video/share/vXzBXJMiBqyEsGUAwdYTjBonc32iv7_K?tab=summary&timestamp=1756.0)
  - [Debate on effectiveness and measurement of impact](https://fathom.video/share/vXzBXJMiBqyEsGUAwdYTjBonc32iv7_K?tab=summary&timestamp=1131.0)
  - [Team agrees to test and potentially share results publicly](https://fathom.video/share/vXzBXJMiBqyEsGUAwdYTjBonc32iv7_K?tab=summary&timestamp=1487.0)

### Client Updates

  - [Monograph interested in LLMs.txt implementation](https://fathom.video/share/vXzBXJMiBqyEsGUAwdYTjBonc32iv7_K?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
  - [Galileo receptive to new AI/LLM tactics, including Reddit posting strategy](https://fathom.video/share/vXzBXJMiBqyEsGUAwdYTjBonc32iv7_K?tab=summary&timestamp=1393.0)
  - [AirByte seeing success with posting content to their Reddit user page](https://fathom.video/share/vXzBXJMiBqyEsGUAwdYTjBonc32iv7_K?tab=summary&timestamp=1524.0)

### SEO and LLM Measurement Tools

  - [Discussion on value of tools like Scrunch for measuring LLM visibility](https://fathom.video/share/vXzBXJMiBqyEsGUAwdYTjBonc32iv7_K?tab=summary&timestamp=1334.0)
  - [Team agrees these are directional indicators, not precise measurements](https://fathom.video/share/vXzBXJMiBqyEsGUAwdYTjBonc32iv7_K?tab=summary&timestamp=1176.0)
  - [Importance of clear communication with clients about experimental nature](https://fathom.video/share/vXzBXJMiBqyEsGUAwdYTjBonc32iv7_K?tab=summary&timestamp=1268.0)

### Webflow Account Management

  - [Pod Webflow aliases now added to client accounts after upgrade](https://fathom.video/share/vXzBXJMiBqyEsGUAwdYTjBonc32iv7_K?tab=summary&timestamp=1866.0)
  - [Will help reduce team members getting kicked out of Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/vXzBXJMiBqyEsGUAwdYTjBonc32iv7_K?tab=summary&timestamp=1900.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Dave to finalize LLMs.txt workflow within 1-2 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/vXzBXJMiBqyEsGUAwdYTjBonc32iv7_K?tab=summary&timestamp=1756.0)
  - [Team to carefully introduce LLMs.txt option to interested clients (e.g., Galileo)](https://fathom.video/share/vXzBXJMiBqyEsGUAwdYTjBonc32iv7_K?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
  - [Andi to create list tracking pod aliases associated with clients](https://fathom.video/share/vXzBXJMiBqyEsGUAwdYTjBonc32iv7_K?tab=summary&timestamp=1875.0)
  - [Team to prioritize using new Webflow access or sending tasks to Suleiman to save time](https://fathom.video/share/vXzBXJMiBqyEsGUAwdYTjBonc32iv7_K?tab=summary&timestamp=1900.0)
